summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ombra Phase 4 features - Autonomy Daemon, Memory Management UI, Tool Safety, and Telegram Router all working correctly with no regressions in existing functionality
passed_tests: Health endpoint - all services online (Ollama, MongoDB, API keys, Telegram bot configured)
Autonomy Daemon Status - running with 7 ticks, proper statistics display
Autonomy Daemon Controls - pause/resume/stop/force-tick all working correctly
Memory Management API - decay, pin/unpin, search, filter functionality
Memory Management UI - search input, filter buttons, pin/unpin, delete, decay button
Tool Safety Policies - get/update policies, safe command execution, blocked dangerous commands
Agents System - 5 agents total (4 built-in: Coder, Researcher, Planner, Executor + 1 custom)
K1 Learning System - 4 active prompts, 8 distillations, learning metrics tracking
Telegram Router - bot properly configured (OmbraIA_bot) and connected
Dashboard Autonomy Controls - pause/resume buttons functional, status badge updates
Dashboard System Status - autonomy status displayed correctly in system panel
Chat Interface - no regressions, agent/model selectors working, White Card toggle present
Settings Page - all 4 tabs working (Runtime, Models, Learning, Telegram)
Agents Page - all built-in agents displayed with proper descriptions and tools
Memory Management Page - stats cards, search, filters, memory list, decay functionality
Navigation - all pages accessible and loading correctly
Tool Safety Command Blocking - dangerous commands properly blocked with error messages
Secret Redaction - sensitive information properly redacted in outputs

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 31 Phase 4 API endpoints working correctly
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All Phase 4 UI components and controls working, no regressions detected
